query: SELECT atolls.name, COUNT(places.id) as island_count FROM places JOIN atolls ON places.atollId = atolls.id WHERE places.type = 'island' GROUP BY places.atollId, atolls.name ORDER BY island_count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT atolls.name, COUNT(places.id) as island_count FROM places JOIN atolls ON places.atollId = atolls.id WHERE places.type = 'island' GROUP BY places.atollId, atolls.name ORDER BY island_count DESC;
